# Expedited Delivery

Acme Shop offers expedited and next-day delivery options to fulfill urgent customer needs. The expedited delivery service typically delivers orders within 2-3 business days, while next-day delivery ensures packages arrive the next business day, provided orders are placed before 3 PM local time on weekdays. These services are limited to select items and destinations, with additional fees based on package specifications. In cases of unforeseen disruptions, Acme Shop's customer service will notify customers of any delays.

[Source: shipping_options.md#expedited-delivery]
